news.title: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
news.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.

news.title: Trump administration's head of AI safety agency resigns after 3 months on job
news.summary: Arvind Raman, the director of National Institute of Standards and Technology, will serve as acting director of CAISI, according to a spokesperson

news.title: Archer stock rips 20% higher as company unveils military craft with Anduril
news.summary: Archer and its eVTOL peers are racing for FAA certification to start flying their air taxis commercially.

news.title: Boeing takes the right approach on new planes. Plus, a word of caution this earnings season
news.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

news.title: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
news.summary: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.

news.title: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
news.summary: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.

news.title: U.S. death toll in Iran, 'The Odyssey' box office, WarshGPT and more in Morning Squawk
news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Voters wary of government ownership in companies as Trump administration takes equity stakes
news.summary: About half of voters believe it isn't appropriate for the U.S. government to own stakes in companies, a new CNBC poll found.

news.title: Bezos backs CuspAI as startup teams up with Nvidia to hunt for chipmaking materials
news.summary: CuspAI is part of a new wave of companies looking to use AI to solve challenges in the physical world.

news.title: China's Zhongji Innolight sees shares surge after Hong Kong listing approval
news.summary: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.

news.title: TSMC is accelerating Arizona factory build-out to capitalize on AI 'megatrend,' CFO says
news.summary: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.

news.title: Cybersecurity risks posed by over-the-air tech in autos has analysts concerned
news.summary: The automotive industry's increasing use of over-the-air technology makes it more susceptible to cyberattacks, analysts say.

news.title: Oracle Credit Risk Hits Near 18-Year High on AI Debt Load Angst
news.summary: The cost of protecting Oracle Corp.’s debt against default reached a fresh multi-year high on Monday while its existing bonds sold off, as doubts grew over whether the company’s massive investments in artificial intelligence will pay off.

news.title: BlackRock’s Meta Deal to Show the Power of $25 Billion M&A Spree
news.summary: For Larry Fink, BlackRock Inc.’s more than $12 billion debt sale for a Meta Platforms Inc. data center is the result of years spent transforming a public investments giant into a heavy hitter in private markets too.

news.title: UBS Trading Desk Says Buy Momentum Stocks as Selloff Nears End
news.summary: The sharp selloff in momentum stocks may be nearing its end, creating an opportunity for investors to start rebuilding positions in artificial intelligence and semiconductor shares, according to UBS’ trading desk.

news.title: Snap Nears Settlement of Addiction Case Ahead of Jury Trial
news.summary: Snap Inc. said it has reached a tentative agreement to settle the second case set for trial over claims that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, leaving only Meta Platforms Inc. to face a jury starting next week in Los Angeles.

news.title: Andreessen Horowtiz Hires Army Vet to American Dynamism Team
news.summary: Giant venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz has hired defense and space technology investor Connor Love, adding a military veteran and prominent VC to a team focused on startups critical to US interests.

news.title: Alibaba Fined Record €550 Million by EU for Illegal Sales
news.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s e-commerce service was fined €550 million ($629 million) by the European Union for selling illegal products in the largest penalty under the bloc’s content moderation rulebook.

news.title: Google Shares Gain on Report of Chip to Boost AI Efficiency
news.summary: Shares of Google owner Alphabet Inc. gained on a report that the company is developing a server chip designed to optimize its Gemini artificial intelligence model.

news.title: Z.AI Completes Giant Data Center With Chinese Chips to Train AI
news.summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a giant data center that houses only Chinese-made chips, a big step in Beijing’s efforts to replace restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

news.title: Chinese AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off
news.summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

news.title: Moonshot’s Kimi AI Model Sets Off Anxiety in the US
news.summary: Moonshot’s release of Kimi K3 sparked fierce debate in the US

news.title: Moonshot AI’s Kimi K3 Stuns Investors, Challenges Anthropic, OpenAI Lead
news.summary: Moonshot’s release is forcing Silicon Valley to reconsider long-held assumptions

news.title: ChatGPT, Claude Infiltrate Dating Apps by Helping Singles Flirt With Matches
news.summary: Singles are outsourcing chats to ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin

news.title: Influencers Are Being Paid to Spread the Mormon Church's Gospel
news.summary: Through its for-profit subsidiary, the church owns several advertising companies with influencer-marketing arms

news.title: Moonshot’s Kimi K3 May Be More About Memory Than Compute
news.summary: When DeepSeek’s R1 debuted in early 2025, almost $600 billion was wiped out from Nvidia Corp.’s market value in a single day on fears that artificial intelligence would require less computing power than previously expected. Moonshot AI’s release of Kimi K3 on Friday triggered a similar reaction, helping push semiconductor stocks sharply lower.

news.title: Chinese Stocks Rebound After National Team Support Resurfaces
news.summary: Chinese shares rose after a choppy session, amid signs of late buying by state funds as authorities intensified efforts to salvage a slumping market.

news.title: Moonshot Is Creating New Winners and Losers in the AI Trade
news.summary: Moonshot AI’s surprise release of a new artificial intelligence model has sent a jolt through markets, forcing investors to reassess some of the biggest assumptions behind the global tech rally.

news.title: AI Is ‘New Engine’ Keeping Chinese Economy From Harder Landing
news.summary: A global rush to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure has turned the technology into a key pocket of growth in China’s economy during one of its weakest stretches in years.

news.title: Prysmian Signs $6.3 Billion Molex Deal for Data-Center Gear
news.summary: Prysmian SpA signed a deal worth as much €5.5 billion ($6.3 billion) to supply Koch Inc.’s Molex with optical cables for its data centers, tapping into the artificial-intelligence build-out.

news.title: Can Kimi K3 Help China Beat US for AI Dominance?: Live Q&A
news.summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions on China’s push to lead the AI race on July 20 at 3 p.m. HKT / 8 a.m. BST

news.title: Blackstone Agrees to Invest in Korean Robotics Supplier Futronic
news.summary: Blackstone Inc. has agreed to invest in Futronic, a South Korean supplier of high-precision actuators used in industrial robotics and the automotive sector.

news.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
news.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

news.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
news.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

news.title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
news.summary: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.

news.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
news.summary: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

news.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
news.summary: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of  turning AI into a business.

news.title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe
news.summary: The one-year-old startup aims to reinvent financial architecture for autonomous AI transactions.

news.title: Judge pauses $110B Paramount-Warner Bros. merger
news.summary: The lawsuit from the states alleges that the deal would harm movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and audiences.

news.title: Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
news.summary: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app.

news.title: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk
news.summary: Two critical security flaws in WordPress’ software have given hackers the chance to remotely take over tens of millions of websites, according to an estimate by a cybersecurity researcher.

news.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
news.summary: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

news.title: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Anthropic researchers
news.summary: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced Monday a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital, Principal VC, and researchers from companies such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

news.title: Hackers stole ‘significant’ amount of data from tech firm relied on by thousands of US hospitals and pharmacies
news.summary: Edinburgh-based tech firm Craneware said customer data was stolen during a cyberattack. The company makes software that thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics rely on for billing patients, potentially exposing health data.

news.title: Watch Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
news.summary: Flock Safety sits right at the center of the debate over where the line should be drawn between privacy and public safety. That’s why we’re bringing Flock’s founder and CEO Garrett Langley to the stage to speak about those very issues.

news.title: Hugging Face confirms breach affected internal datasets and credentials, urges users to take action
news.summary: Hugging Face is urging users to rotate any access tokens stored on the platform and review account activity.

news.title: StrictlyVC returns to New York City September 10 to celebrate a huge year for the city’s startup community
news.summary: For the first time since 2024, StrictlyVC is coming back to New York City — and we're bringing the kind of access you’d expect from an under-wraps event to the whole startup, VC, and dealmaking community.

news.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
news.summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

news.title: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
news.summary: Last October, we told you how the FCC had given itself the power to retroactively ban gadgets that have already received its approval to be imported and sold in the United States. Now, the FCC's getting ready to wield that power for the first time, by cracking down on the "DJI front companies" suspected of […]

news.title: The Odyssey turned me into an IMAX believer
news.summary: After seeing Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey for the first time early last week, I came away impressed, but somewhat conflicted about two of the film's more fantastical set pieces. While those scenes were beautifully crafted and tremendously acted, there was something a little bit off about the way they hit my eye. I spent days […]

So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpriced - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does […]

news.title: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
news.summary: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown. The bundle will be available until August 7th, though the bundle page notes that keys for […]

news.title: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
news.summary: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly […]

news.title: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
news.summary: The end of the Ford F-150 Lightning was also the start of a new era for the automaker. After failing to capture the market with the electric version of its popular F-Series truck, Ford is going back to the drawing board with its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform. The first offering will be a $30,000 electric […]

news.title: Judge pauses Paramount’s attempt to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
news.summary: A judge partially granted the request from a dozen state attorneys general to temporarily place the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery on hold, as reported by Variety and Reuters. US District Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín said that based on the new company's market share, "the Court is persuaded that it can presume […]

news.title: LG’s glossy OLED gaming monitor is rare to find under $400
news.summary: If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your gaming monitor, LG’s 27-inch 27GX704A-B pairs a glossy WOLED panel with a fast refresh rate, and it’s currently on sale for $379.99 (about $70 off) at Amazon and directly from LG, marking a new low price. It originally launched at $799.99, but has been available for under $500 since […]

news.title: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
news.summary: A video from Gamers Nexus explains how, after connecting a new LG UltraGear monitor to a PC running Windows 11 for the first time, Windows Update is silently installing LG driver updates and the LG Monitor App Installer, without so much as a permission pop-up or notification. The app doesn't appear to include special controls […]

AAPL.fact_check: 현재 시장에서 Apple의 주가는 분석가 평균 목표가보다 높지만, 시장의 두려움 지수와 일부 부정적 뉴스가 주가에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 공식적인 뉴스는 없지만, 시장의 불확실성이 존재합니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: Apple의 주가는 분석가의 목표가를 초과하고 있으며, Stocktwits의 긍정적 비율이 50%로 중립적입니다. 그러나 Fear & Greed 지수가 '두려움'을 나타내고 있습니다.
AAPL.key_insight: Apple의 주가는 현재 분석가 목표가보다 높지만, 시장의 두려움 지수가 높은 상황입니다. 이는 투자자들이 조심스럽게 접근해야 함을 시사합니다. 장기적으로는 Apple의 기술 혁신이 긍정적 요인으로 작용할 수 있습니다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: 시장 불확실성과 두려움 지수가 높아 관망이 적절합니다.
AAPL.summary_one_line: Apple의 주가는 분석가 목표가를 초과했지만, 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 관망이 필요합니다.

MSFT.fact_check: AMD의 Helios 시스템에 Microsoft가 고객으로 합류했다는 소식은 공식 확인된 사실이다. 이는 Microsoft의 AI 전략 강화에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: Microsoft의 AI 관련 소식이 긍정적이며, 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천이 있지만, 시장의 Fear & Greed 지수가 낮아 주의가 필요하다.
MSFT.key_insight: Microsoft는 AMD의 새로운 AI 시스템인 Helios의 고객으로 합류하여 AI 분야에서의 입지를 강화하고 있다. 이는 향후 AI 관련 매출 증가에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 하지만 시장의 전반적인 불확실성은 여전히 존재한다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 AI 분야에서의 전략적 움직임이 긍정적이다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: Microsoft는 AI 분야에서의 전략적 강화로 긍정적인 전망을 보이고 있다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Alphabet의 새로운 AI 칩 개발 소식은 여러 매체에서 보도되었으며, 이는 공식적으로 확인된 사실입니다. 그러나 이 칩이 실제로 얼마나 효율성을 높일지는 아직 검증되지 않았습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: AI 칩 개발 뉴스가 긍정적이지만, 시장의 두려움 지수와 중립적인 투자 심리가 혼재되어 있습니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Alphabet이 새로운 AI 칩을 개발 중이라는 소식은 기술 발전에 긍정적입니다. 이는 AI 모델의 효율성을 높여 비용 절감과 성능 향상을 기대할 수 있습니다. 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수가 높은 점은 주의가 필요합니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: AI 칩 개발 소식은 긍정적이지만, 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
risk_factors: AI 칩 개발이 실제 성과로 이어지지 않을 가능성
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Alphabet의 AI 칩 개발 소식은 긍정적이지만, 시장의 두려움 지수를 고려해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

AMZN.fact_check: AMZN의 8-K 공시는 공식적으로 확인된 사실이며, Bezos의 CuspAI 지원은 긍정적인 뉴스로 보입니다. 다른 뉴스는 AMZN과 직접 관련이 없습니다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가, Fear & Greed 지수의 부정적 요소가 혼재되어 있습니다.
AMZN.key_insight: 아마존은 현재 긍정적인 분석가의 평가를 받고 있으며, 주가 상승 여력이 큽니다. 그러나 시장의 전반적인 두려움 지수는 투자자들에게 신중함을 요구합니다. CuspAI와의 협력은 AI 분야에서의 경쟁력을 강화할 수 있는 기회입니다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가로 인해 매수 추천합니다.
AMZN.summary_one_line: 아마존은 긍정적인 분석가 평가와 AI 협력 강화로 매수 기회가 있습니다.

NVDA.fact_check: AMD의 Helios 출시와 관련된 뉴스는 사실이며, 이는 Nvidia의 시장 점유율에 도전할 수 있는 요소로 보입니다. 그러나 Nvidia의 현재 시장 지위는 여전히 강력하며, 공식적으로 확인된 위협은 아닙니다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가, 그러나 시장의 두려움과 경쟁사의 도전으로 인해 중립 이상의 긍정적 심리.
NVDA.key_insight: Nvidia는 여전히 AI 분야에서 강력한 입지를 가지고 있으며, 분석가들은 높은 목표가를 제시하고 있습니다. 그러나 AMD와 같은 경쟁사의 도전이 증가하고 있어 주의가 필요합니다. 투자자들은 시장의 두려움 지표를 고려하여 신중하게 접근해야 합니다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: 경쟁사의 도전과 시장의 두려움 지표를 고려할 때 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
risk_factors: AMD의 Helios 출시로 인한 경쟁 심화
NVDA.summary_one_line: Nvidia는 강력한 입지를 유지하고 있으나, 경쟁사의 도전과 시장의 두려움으로 인해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

META.fact_check: BlackRock의 Meta 데이터 센터 관련 M&A는 공식적으로 확인된 사실이며, AMD의 Helios 시스템 관련 뉴스는 Meta가 고객으로 언급되었으나 과장된 부분은 없음.
META.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가에도 불구하고 시장의 두려움 지수와 혼합된 뉴스 심리로 인해 긍정적이지만 신중한 접근이 필요.
META.key_insight: Meta는 현재 AI 및 데이터 센터 분야에서 강력한 파트너십을 구축하고 있습니다. 이는 장기적인 성장 가능성을 높이는 긍정적인 요소입니다. 그러나 시장의 불확실성과 경쟁 심화는 주의가 필요합니다.
META.recommendation_reason: 시장 불확실성과 경쟁 심화로 인해 관망이 적절.
META.summary_one_line: Meta는 강력한 성장 잠재력을 가지고 있지만, 시장의 불확실성과 경쟁 심화로 인해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

TSLA.fact_check: 현재 시장 데이터와 뉴스 분석 결과, 테슬라의 주가는 전일 대비 하락했으나 이는 시장 전반의 불안감에 기인한 것으로 보입니다. 주요 뉴스에서 테슬라 관련 직접적인 부정적 보도는 확인되지 않았습니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 목표가가 현재가보다 높고, 추천이 '매수'인 점에서 긍정적이지만, Fear & Greed 지수가 'fear'를 나타내고 있어 중립 이상의 점수를 부여했습니다.
TSLA.key_insight: 테슬라의 주가는 현재 시장의 불안감 속에서 하락세를 보이고 있습니다. 그러나 분석가들의 목표가는 여전히 현재가보다 높으며, 장기적으로 긍정적인 전망이 유지되고 있습니다. 투자자들은 단기적인 시장 변동성보다는 장기적인 성장 가능성에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 시장의 불안감이 해소될 때까지 관망하는 것이 바람직합니다.
TSLA.summary_one_line: 테슬라는 현재 시장 불안 속에서도 장기적인 성장 가능성을 지닌 주식입니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 전반적으로 신중한 분위기입니다. 주요 기술 주식들은 긍정적인 전망을 보이지만, 시장의 두려움 지수로 인해 관망이 필요합니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Microsoft는 AI 분야에서의 전략적 강화로 긍정적인 전망을 보이고 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 AI 분야에서 긍정적인 전망을 보이는 종목에 주목하면서도, 시장의 불확실성을 고려해 신중한 접근을 유지해야 합니다. 특히, 관망이 추천된 종목들은 추가적인 시장 동향을 지켜보는 것이 좋습니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: AI 기술 발전과 관련 기업의 전략적 변화
daily_insights.Full_Summary: 최근 AI 기술의 발전과 관련하여 여러 기업들이 전략적 변화를 모색하고 있습니다. Alphabet은 새로운 AI 칩 개발을 통해 효율성을 높이고 있으며, Nvidia는 AI 관련 대규모 투자를 통해 시장에서의 입지를 강화하고 있습니다. 이러한 움직임은 AI 기술의 중요성을 재확인시켜주며, 관련 기업들의 주가에도 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: AI 기술의 발전과 관련 기업들의 적극적인 투자 및 전략적 변화는 M7 기업 주가에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상되며, 이는 시장의 기대감을 반영합니다.
